text.title: linear-issue-tracking Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for linear-issue-tracking as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Automatically moving all incomplete issues from Cycle N to Cycle N+1 after cycle close.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Stale issues accumulate in active cycles, inflating planned velocity. Review filters out issues that are no longer relevant before committing them to the next cycle.
